title: Nightshade Cobbled
description: Nightshade Cobbled Modpack is a server modpack built for the Nightshade Cobbled community and around the Cobblemon mod. This modpack includes optimization mods to improve performance.
body:
Nightshade Cobbled Modpack is a server modpack built around the Cobblemon mod. This modpack includes Cobblemon along with various performance mods to allow our players to better enjoy our Nightshade Cobblemon server better.

 

Features

List coming soon..

 

Note

No important notes as of yet however, please watch this modpack for improvements.
